---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that does not work as documented
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

## What happened

A clear description of the bug.

## What you expected

What you expected to happen instead.

## Reproduction

Steps to reproduce, ideally with the outfit spec involved:

1. Run `outfit ...`
2. ...

## Environment

- Outfit version: `outfit --version`
- Target runtime: (claude-code / openai-agents)
- Node version: `node --version`
- OS:

## Logs

Any error output from the failing command.
